purpose: Move folders / leadsheets / KC forms / reports under a new parent. Batch native (folderParentLineItems is array).
transport: XMLHttpRequest (fetch fails CORS preflight from engagement origin)

body_template.engagementId: {clientId}  // misnamed — value is the Axcess clientId, not engagementId

gotchas: Move PRESERVES the index and the locationId is stable across moves - Move does NOT clear anything. There is no Set-Index-after-move requirement EXCEPT for genuinely new forms that arrived with a null/empty index; for those, Set-Index AFTER the move.
Leadsheet moves trigger an auto-file cascade — other unfiled leadsheets with matching sub-folder indexes also get filed. One move can have wide effects.
Folder-style payload returns 200 but is a silent no-op when objectType == 'KCForms'. Use LeadSheet-style swap for KCForms.
script_function: scripts.wpm.move(client_id, items, headers)  # items is list of (object_type, own_loc, dest_loc, object_id)
